plan_metadata.name: General Teams Agent Azure OpenAI ts Remote Debug

steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu to select it.
Click the "General Teams Agent" option from the dropdown menu in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" panel.
Click on the "TypeScript" option in the programming language dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder" option in the workspace folder selection dropdown at coordinates (433, 75).
